test_cases.title: Bridge sync protocol: sidecar returns tool schemas
test_cases.description: Verify bridge:sync request receives tool schemas from PluginService
steps: Register a test tool via api.tools.register()
Bridge sends bridge:sync request via extension_ui_request
Verify response contains the registered tool schema
Verify Bridge calls pi.registerTool() with correct parameters

test_cases.title: Bridge tool execute: LLM call routes to Worker
test_cases.description: Verify proxy tool execute request routes through bridge → sidecar → Worker
steps: Register a test tool with execute handler
Bridge receives tool call from pi LLM
Bridge receives response and returns to pi

test_cases.title: Bridge connection state machine: reconnect on disconnect
test_cases.description: Verify Bridge reconnects when sidecar restarts
steps: Verify Bridge re-enters Ready state within 60s

test_cases.title: api.tools.register: tool schema stored and synced
test_cases.description: Verify tool registration stores schema and triggers bridge sync
steps: Verify tool schema stored in PluginService.toolRegistry

test_cases.title: api.hooks.onBeforeAgentStart: injectedMessages reach bridge
test_cases.description: Verify hook handler's injectedMessages forwarded to pi
steps: Bridge receives before_agent_start event from pi
Bridge injects messages into pi context

test_cases.title: PluginService.executeHooks: blocked stops chain
test_cases.description: Verify hook chain stops when handler returns blocked:true
steps: Verify handler1 executed, handler2 executed, handler3 NOT executed

test_cases.title: sendMessage beforeSend hook: content transformed
test_cases.description: Verify beforeSend hook can modify message content
steps: Verify message sent to pi has content 'modified'

test_cases.title: PermissionChecker: sandbox plugin denied without permission
test_cases.description: Verify sandbox plugin cannot call protected API without permission
steps: Register sandbox plugin with no permissions
Verify response contains PERMISSION_DENIED error code

test_cases.title: PermissionChecker: trusted plugin always allowed
test_cases.description: Verify trusted plugin bypasses permission check

test_cases.title: Worker sandbox: require('fs') throws
test_cases.description: Verify sandbox Worker blocks Node.js builtins
steps: Create sandbox Worker with plugin code calling require('fs')
Verify Error thrown with message about blocked module
Verify Worker does not crash (error caught)

test_cases.title: Worker sandbox: api.storage.get works
test_cases.description: Verify sandbox Worker can still use agentAPI

test_cases.title: Built-in plugin: cannot disable or uninstall
PluginActivator: topological sort respects dependencies
test_cases.description: Verify plugins activated in dependency order
steps: Register plugin A (depends on B), plugin B (no deps)

test_cases.title: PluginActivator: cycle detection rejects activation
test_cases.description: Verify circular dependencies are detected and rejected
steps: Register plugin A (depends on B), plugin B (depends on A)
Verify error thrown about circular dependency

test_cases.title: Goal plugin: create_tasks action persists via sessionData
test_cases.description: Verify goal state stored in sessionData
steps: Verify api.sessionData.set called with goal state
Verify response contains task list with correct structure

test_cases.title: Goal plugin: onBeforeAgentStart injects steering prompt
test_cases.description: Verify goal hook injects context for LLM
steps: Verify goal hook handler returns injectedMessages with task status

test_cases.title: Todo plugin: add action persists via sessionData
test_cases.description: Verify todo state stored in sessionData
steps: Verify subsequent action=list returns added item

test_cases.title: Todo plugin: state restores on session_start
test_cases.description: Verify todo state recovery from sessionData
steps: Verify todo plugin reads sessionData and restores state
